medical_history.chief_complaint: dry and non-itching skin lesions on the face and extremities
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Symptoms started ten months ago after a fever episode. Past medical history included recurrent upper respiratory tract infections including otitis media and one episode of hospitalization for bronchopneumonia.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Recurrent upper respiratory tract infections, otitis media, bronchopneumonia.

physical_examination.general_examination: Weight of 10 kg (3-10%), height of 80 cm (3-10%), head circumference of 46 cm (10%). Pink to dark red infiltrated papules and plaques with occasional centrally oriented scales located on bilateral malar cheeks and arms. Cervical, 1x1 cm in size, non-fixing lymphadenopathy. Tachypneic and crepitant crackles present in both lung fields.
